title: rubus × obtusatiformis
intro: Rubus × obtusatiformis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, combining characteristics of the Himalayan black raspberry (Rubus ellipticus) and the Himalayan raspberry (Rubus armeniacus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × obtusatiformis include its potential as an anti-inflammatory agent, antiviral properties, and antioxidant activities. This plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Rubus × obtusatiformis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
